title: jacobaea maritima
intro: Jacobaea maritima, also known as sea ragwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Jacobaea maritima can be used in herbal preparations like infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically for skin issues.
